description: Use this API to define or modify the comments for the specified file. This API routine was first introduced in release 33.0.0. ierr = scenariofilesetcomments(sgroup, sfile, ncommentblocks, comments, append)
python_syntax: ierr = scenariofilesetcomments(sgroup, sfile, ncommentblocks, comments, append)

parameters.name: sgroup
parameters.description: Group that contains the specified file. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: sfile
parameters.description: Name of the file whose attributes are to be modified. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: ncommentblocks
parameters.description: Number of 72 character strings that make up the comment. in python, this number can be set to 1 and the full comment string given as the first comment block. (input; 0 by default).

parameters.name: comments
parameters.description: An array of NCOMMENTBLOCKS elements specifying comment string to be defined for or added to the comments for the specified file. (input; unchanged by default).

parameters.name: append
parameters.description: Flag for appending comments. if true, comments is appended to the current comments. if false, the current comments are overwritten by comments. (input; FALSE by default).
